notes: Case 01-10 appears in the docket list of the 29th General Assembly (GA29_2001) as 'Charles C. Kim vs. Korean Capital Presbytery (Appeal)' on pages 71-72. The SJC report explicitly states that this case 'is in process' and no decision opinion is provided. The case was one of many related complex Korean Capital Presbytery disputes being heard by a five-member SJC panel. No full decision text found in the candidate pages.
